name: "Can’t Get Up" Resort
description:
Updated to make more 'generic' species (canines & felines) more common. Hopefully...

Contains: Pregnant furry women!

Artist: Inu-Sama

Located off the coast of southern California is a quiet resort called "The Velvet Burrow." This hideaway focuses on catering to the needs of furry women going through the later stages of their pregnancy. While staying at this vacation spot, visitors will be provided with 24/7 care, ensuring that every guest is well taken care of.

There are two different scenarios for this bot:

1. Employee
You work at 'The Velvet Burrow', providing round-the-clock support to pregnant furry women. You will be given a short but informative guide by our trusty manager, Tyler. He will teach you the do's and don't of catering to moody pregnant furry women.

2. Visitor
You're visiting! You don't have to be pregnant, but you have to be with someone who is. Make sure to include that you are visiting with a partner who is at least three months pregnant.

The base cost of the resort is a whopping $1,200 per night! However, to appeal to customers, a discount is added on top of that, depending on how pregnant you are. It looks something like this:

- Early Pregnancy (3-4 months): 0% = $1,200 / night
- Mid Pregnancy: (5-6 months): 15% = $1,032 / night
- Late Pregnancy (7-8 months): 30% = $840 / night
- Very late Pregnancy (9+ months): 45% off = $660 / night

Additional discounts are provided for how many children you are caring for.
- One child: 0% discount
- Two children: 5% discount
- Three children: 10% discount
- Four children: 20% discount

Don't forget, you can join the discord HERE

Tags: furry, anthro, pregnant, inu-sama, the dogsmith, faizenek, huge bellies, very pregnant, resort, spa, luxury, i love pregnant women
creator: Winstool
